info.description: API for managing Caddy nodes: AWS SSM, SSH, HTTP admin, GCP OS Config, Azure Run Command, or inventory-only; discovery includes AWS, static IP, GCP labels, and Azure tags.
info.title: Caddy Dashboard API

post.description: Returns the secret once; it cannot be retrieved again.

parameters.description: Include logs up to this time (RFC3339)
parameters.name: to

post.description: Authenticates user and returns access and refresh JWTs
Issues a new access and refresh token pair

Creates a discovery rule (methods: aws_tag, aws_ssm, static_ip, gcp_labels, azure_tags; aws_cidr not implemented). For gcp_labels / azure_tags optional parameters JSON field `node_transport` may be `gcp_osconfig` or `azure_run_command` to register runnable nodes (default inventory_only).

get.summary: List domain profiles for a discovery group

post.description: Adds hostnames to the first reachable Caddy node in the group and propagates config to peers. Authenticated via API key.
post.summary: Register domains on a Caddy discovery group

post.description: Adds an upstream dial to the first reachable Caddy node in the group and propagates config to peers. Authenticated via API key.
post.summary: Register upstream dial on a Caddy discovery group

post.description: Executes discovery for a specific discovery config and upserts found nodes

get.description: Returns stored Caddy snapshots for a discovery group

get.summary: List upstream profiles for a discovery group

post.description: Adds hostnames for all bindings in the profile on the first reachable Caddy node and propagates to peers. Authenticated via API key.
post.summary: Register domains using a domain profile

post.description: Creates a Caddy node (transports: aws_ssm, ssh, http_admin, gcp_osconfig, azure_run_command, inventory_only; see transport_config for provider fields)

put.description: Updates an existing node by ID

post.description: Applies Caddy config to node via SSM and stores a snapshot

get.description: Fetches current Caddy JSON config from the node via SSM (same as sync) without storing a snapshot
Fetches live Caddy config and returns all discovered @id entries, including upstream metadata when present
get.summary: List @id entries from live Caddy config

get.description: Fetches live Caddy config and returns the JSON fragment matching the requested @id
Fetches live Caddy config and returns unique hosts extracted from upstreams associated with the requested @id
Fetches live Caddy config and returns upstreams associated with the requested @id

post.description: Adds/removes host domains on one or more config fragments by @id and optional match indexes, then applies updated config
Adds/removes/prunes upstream dials on one or more config fragments by @id, then applies updated config
Fetches live config from source node and applies it to peer nodes in the same discovery config
post.summary: Propagate source node config to discovery peers

post.description: Runs Caddy reload on node via SSM

get.description: Returns stored Caddy configuration snapshots for a node

post.description: Fetches current Caddy config from node via SSM and stores a snapshot

get.description: Returns readiness status after running dependency checks

get.summary: Get a scheduled task by ID
List execution logs for a scheduled task

post.summary: Enable or disable a scheduled task

post.description:
Reassigns discovery_config_id on legacy node-scoped snapshots for discovery configs using snapshot_scope=group.
Idempotent and safe to re-run. Endpoint is admin-only and rate-limited.
Adds upstream dials for all bindings in the profile on the first reachable Caddy node and propagates to peers. Authenticated via API key.
post.summary: Register upstream dials using an upstream profile

ssm_enabled.description: Deprecated: use Transport == TransportAWSSSM instead; kept for API compatibility.
